notes: Synthetic reads with known ITS — Phase 0/1 fixture

WGS genomic shotgun of Alternaria alternata isolate CS330 (study PRJEB93827; exp ERX14787063; verified via ENA 2026-06-19); ~9.3M Illumina HiSeq PE151 reads (~1.4 Gb; ~42x of a ~33 Mb genome). source=sra is for rDNA/ITS recovery only — because Logan collapses the rDNA tandem array to ~65bp (D20); Logan IS fine here for genomic/single-copy content. [corrected 2026-06-19 — previously mislabeled as a Collinsia ITS amplicon; that identification was a fabrication — see D22]
